# Sage Outdoor Advisory – Resources

> Sage Outdoor Advisory's resources subdomain provides outdoor hospitality industry data, expert guides, and marketing landing pages. It hosts an interactive Glamping Map with 600+ properties across North America, 21+ guides on feasibility studies and appraisals, a glossary of 57+ industry terms, and service landing pages for glamping, RV resort, and campground feasibility studies and appraisals.

## Key Pages

- [Glamping Map](/map): Interactive map of glamping properties with filters by unit type, rate category, and location
- [Guides](/guides): Expert guides on feasibility studies, appraisals, and outdoor hospitality
- [Glossary](/glossary): Industry terms and definitions
- [Partners](/partners): Partner organizations and resources
- [Landing Pages](/landing/glamping-feasibility-study): Service landing pages for feasibility studies and appraisals

## Services

- Glamping feasibility studies
- RV resort feasibility studies
- Campground feasibility studies
- Glamping appraisals
- RV resort and campground appraisals

## Contact

- Website: https://sageoutdooradvisory.com
- Contact: https://sageoutdooradvisory.com/contact-us

## Tech Stack

- Next.js 14 (App Router)
- TypeScript
- Tailwind CSS
- Supabase (property data)
- Google Maps (map display)
- Vercel (hosting)
